kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Sauce Labs Backpack'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.name: Invalid Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Login With Invalid Credentials Should Fail
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc:
A test suite containing tests related to invalid login.
These tests are data-driven by their nature. They use a single keyword, specified with Test Template setting, that is called with different arguments to cover different scenarios.
This suite also demonstrates using setups and teardowns in different levels.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Click Button

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

test.name: Scenario: Sort Items By Name A To Z

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'class:product_sort_container' by value az.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.msg: ${expected_names} = ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)']
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Reverse List
kw.doc: Reverses the given list in place.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.msg: ${expected_names} = ['Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Backpack']
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Reverse List
kw.doc: Reverses the given list in place.

kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Remove String
kw.doc: Removes all ``removables`` from the given ``string``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Remove String
kw.doc: Removes all ``removables`` from the given ``string``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Remove String
kw.doc: Removes all ``removables`` from the given ``string``.

kw.name: Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Reverse List
kw.doc: Reverses the given list in place.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.name: Valid Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc:
A test suite with a single test for valid login.
This test has a workflow that is created using keywords in the imported resource file.
